baseline_summary: Baseline correctly routes the contradiction into review, but its readability can still make the disagreement feel more settled than the evidence warrants.
delta_summary: Delta preflight marked high framing risk, challenge outcome confirmed, and 1 ledger entry preserved why coherent flow could still imply false consensus.

comparison_axes.reason: Baseline already recognizes the contradiction, and Delta mostly corrects the degree of closure around it.
Both tracks respect the no-runtime and no-truth boundaries.
Delta is better at keeping unresolved disagreement visible instead of letting coherence imply closure.
Delta names the missing signals that still limit confidence.
Both tracks still produce a usable hold posture once the contradiction stays explicit.
